t(u) : Promise.resolve(u).then(r, o); }\nfunction _asyncToGenerator(n) { return function () { var t = this, e = arguments; return new Promise(function (r, o) { var a = n.apply(t, e); function _next(n) { asyncGeneratorStep(a, r, o, _next, _throw, \"next\", n); } function _throw(n) { asyncGeneratorStep(a, r, o, _next, _throw, \"throw\", n); } _next(void 0); }); }; }\nfunction _slicedToArray(r, e) { return _arrayWithHoles(r) || _iterableToArrayLimit(r, e) || _unsupportedIterableToArray(r, e) || _nonIterableRest(); }\nfunction _nonIterableRest() { throw new TypeError(\"Invalid attempt to destructure non-iterable instance.\\nIn order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method.\"); }\nfunction _unsupportedIterableToArray(r, a) { if (r) { if (\"string\" == typeof r) return _arrayLikeToArray(r, a); var t = {}.toString.call(r).slice(8, -1); return \"Object\" === t && r.constructor && (t = r.constructor.name), \"Map\" === t || \"Set\" === t ? || r[\"@@iterator\"]; if (null != t) { var e, n, i, u, a = [], f = !0, o = !1; try { if (i = (t = t.call(r)).next, 0 === l) { if (Object(t) !== t) return; f = !1; } else for (; !(f = (e = i.call(t)).done) && (a.push(e.value), a.length !== l); f = !0); } catch (r) { o = !0, n = r; } finally { try { if (!f && null != t[\"return\"] && (u = t[\"return\"](), Object(u) !== u)) return; } finally { if (o) throw n; } } return a; } }\nfunction _arrayWithHoles(r) { if (Array.isArray(r)) return r; }\nvar _React = React,\n  useState = _React.useState,\n  useEffect = _React.useEffect,\n      setIsPlaying(true);\n            _context.n = 5;\n            break;\n          case 4:\n            _context.p = 4;\n            _t = _context.v;\n            console.warn(\"Reproducción interrumpida por el navegador.\");\n          case 5:\n            _context.n = 7;\n            break;\n          case 6:\n            audioRef.current.pause();\n            setIsPlaying(false);\n          case 7:\n            return _context.a(2);\n        }\n      }, _callee, null, [[2, 4]]);\n    }));\n    function togglePlay() {\n      return _togglePlay.apply(this, arguments);\n    }\n    return togglePlay;\n  }();\n\n  // ========================================================\n  // INTEGRACIÓN: MEDIA SESSION (CONTROLES PANTALLA BLOQUEO)\n  // ========================================================\n  useEffect(function () {\n    if ('mediaSession' in navigator) {\n      try {\n        // Construimos la URL absoluta de forma segura\n        var absoluteLogoUrl = \"\";\n        try {\n          var baseUrl = window.location.origin + window.location.pathname;\n          absoluteLogoUrl = new URL(RADIO_CONFIG.logoPath, baseUrl).href;\n        } catch (e) {\n          absoluteLogoUrl = RADIO_CONFIG.logoPath;\n        }\n        navigator.mediaSession.metadata = new MediaMetadata({\n          title: (currentProgram === null ||            src: absoluteLogoUrl,\n            sizes: '512x512',\n            type: 'image/png'\n          }]\n        });\n        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('play', togglePlay);\n Session:\", err);\n      }\n    }\n  }, [currentProgram, isPlaying]);\n  useEffect(function () {\n    var splashTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n      return setIsSplash(false);\n    }, 4500);\n    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator && (window.location.protocol === 'https:' || window.location.hostname === 'localhost')) {\n      navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js').then(function (reg) {\n        reg.onupdatefound = function () {\n          var installingWorker = reg.installing;\n          installingWorker.onstatechange = function () {\n            if (installingWorker.state === 'installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller) {\n              window.location.reload();\n            }\n          };\n        };\n      })[\"catch\"](function (e) {\n        return console.warn('SW:', e.message);\n      });\n    }\n    window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', function (e) {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setDeferredPrompt(e);\n      setShowInstallBtn(true);\n    });\n    var updateTimeLogic = function updateTimeLogic() {\n      var now = new Date();\n      var cur = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes();\n      var day = now.getDay();\n      var timeToMin = function timeToMin(t) {\n        var _t$split$map = t.split(':').map(Number),\n          _t$split$map2 = _slicedToArray(_t$split$map, 2),\n          h = _t$split$map2[0],\n          m = _t$split$map2[1];\n        return h * 60 + m;\n      };\n      var prog = SCHEDULE.find(function (p) {\n        return p.category !== 'pronto' && cur >= timeToMin(p.start) && cur < timeToMin(p.end) && (p.days ? p.days.includes(day) : true);\n      });\n      setCurrentProgram(prog || null);\n      var upcoming = null;\n      var label = \"Hoy\";\n      upcoming = SCHEDULE.filter(function (p) {\n        return p.category !== 'pronto' && p.days.includes(day);\n      }).filter(function (p) {\n        return timeToMin(p.start) > cur;\n      }).sort(function (a, b) {\n        return timeToMin(a.start) - timeToMin(b.start);\n      })[0];\n      if (!upcoming) {\n        var _loop = function _loop() {\n          var checkDay = (day + i) % 7;\n          var found = SCHEDULE.filter(function (p) {\n            return p.category !== 'pronto' && p.days.includes(checkDay);\n          }).sort(function (a, b) {\n            return timeToMin(a.start) - timeToMin(b.start);\n          })[0];\n          if (found) {\n            upcoming = found;\n            label = i === 1 ? \"Mañana\" : DAYS_FULL[checkDay];\n            return 1; // break\n          }\n        };\n        for (var i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {\n          if (_loop()) break;\n        }\n      }\n      setNextProgram(upcoming || null);\n      setNextDayInfo(label);\n    };\n    updateTimeLogic();\n    var interval = setInterval(updateTimeLogic, 30000);\n    return function () {\n      clearInterval(interval);\n      clearTimeout(splashTimer);\n    };\n  }, []);\n  var fetchNews = /*#__PURE__*/function () {\n    var _fetchNews = _asyncToGenerator(/*#__PURE__*/_regenerator().m(function _callee2() {\n      var target, proxies, processData, _i, _proxies, url, res, raw, data, _t2;\n      return _regenerator().w(function (_context2) {\n        while (1) switch (_context2.p = _context2.n) {\n          case 0:\n            setLoadingNews(true);\n            target \"https://corsproxy.io/?\".concat(encodeURIComponent(target))];\n            processData = function processData(json) {\n              try {\n                var _json$feed;\n                var === void 0 ? void 0 : _e$link$find.href) || RADIO_CONFIG.webUrl;\n                  var img = \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500382017468-9049fed747ef?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=400\";\n                  if (e.media$thumbnail) img = e.media$thumbnail.url.replace('/s72-c/', '/s640/');\n                  return {\n                    title: e.title.$t,\n                    link: link,\n                    date: new Date(e.published.$t).toLocaleDateString('es-ES', {\n                      day: 'numeric',\n                      month: 'short'\n                    }),\n 'Toca para leer más.'\n                  };\n                });\n                setNews(formatted);\n                setLoadingNews(false);\n              } catch (err) {\n                setLoadingNews(false);\n              }\n            };\n            _i = 0, _proxies = proxies;\n          case 1:\n            if (!(_i < _proxies.length)) {\n              _context2.n = 8;\n              break;\n            }\n            url = _proxies[_i];\n            _context2.p = 2;\n            _context2.n = 3;\n            return fetch(url);\n          case 3:\n            res = _context2.v;\n            _context2.n = 4;\n            return res.json();\n          case 4:\n            raw = _context2.v;\n            data = typeof raw.contents === 'string' ? _context2.a(2);\n          case 5:\n            _context2.n = 7;\n            break;\n          case 6:\n            _context2.p = 6;\n            _t2 = _context2.v;\n          case 7:\n null, [[2, 6]]);\n    }));\n    function fetchNews() {\n      return _fetchNews.apply(this, arguments);\n    }\n    return fetchNews;\n  }();\n  useEffect(function () {\n    if (currentView === 'news' && news.length === 0) fetchNews();\n  }, [currentView]);\n  var handleInstall = /*#__PURE__*/function () {\n    var _handleInstall = _asyncToGenerator(/*#__PURE__*/_regenerator().m(function _callee3() {\n      var _yield$deferredPrompt, outcome;\n      return _regenerator().w(function (_context3) {\n        while (1) switch (_context3.n) {\n          case 0:\n            if (deferredPrompt) {\n              _context3.n = 1;\n              break;\n            }\n            return _context3.a(2);\n          case 1:\n            deferredPrompt.prompt();\n            _context3.n = 2;\n return _handleInstall.apply(this, arguments);\n    }\n    return handleInstall;\n  }();\n  var sendWp = function sendWp(e) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    var msg = \"\\uD83D\\uDCFB \\xA1Hola Voces Campesinas!\\n\\n*\".concat(formType === 'cancion' ? 'PEDIDO MUSICAL' : 'MENSAJE', \"*\\nNombre: \").concat(requestData.nombre, \"\\n\").concat(formType === 'cancion' ? \"pt-4 mt-2 border-t border-white/5 flex flex-col items-center gap-2.5 text-[10px] text-white/40 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest\"\n  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"div\", {\n    className: \"flex items-center gap-2\"\n  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(Icon, {\n    name: \"mail\",\n    size: 14,\n    className: \"text-[#F4D03F]\"\n  }), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"span\", null, \"E-Mail:\"), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"a\", {\n    href: \"mailto:\".concat(RADIO_CONFIG.email),\n    className: \"text-white/80 lowercase font-normal\"\n  }, RADIO_CONFIG.email)), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"div\", {\n    className: \"flex items-center gap-2\"\n  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(Icon, {\n    name: \"message-square\",\n    size: 14,\n    className: \"text-[#F4D03F]\"\n  }), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"span\", null, \"WhatsApp:\"), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"a\", {\n    href: \"https://wa.me/\".concat(RADIO_CONFIG.whatsapp),\n    className: \"text-white/80\"\n  }, RADIO_CONFIG.displayWhatsapp)))))), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"div\", {\n    className: \"fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-lg z-50 pointer-events-none\"\n  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"nav\", {\n    className: \"pointer-events-auto bg-[#0a0e13]/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 flex justify-around items-center h-14 shadow-2xl\"\n  }, [{\n    id: 'home',\n    l: 'Radio',\n    i: 'radio'\n  }, {\n    id: 'schedule',\n    l: 'Horarios',\n    i: 'calendar'\n  }, {\n    id: 'news',\n    l: 'Noticias',\n    i: 'newspaper'\n  }, {\n    id: 'social',\n    l: 'Redes',\n    i: 'share-2'\n  }].map(function (t) {\n    return /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"button\", {\n      key: t.id,\n      onClick: function onClick() {\n        return setCurrentView(t.id);\n      },\n      className: \"flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 transition-all px-6 h-full justify-center \".concat(currentView === t.id ? 'active-tab' : 'text-white/30')\n    }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(Icon, {\n      name: t.i,\n      size: 20\n    }), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(\"span\", {\n      className: \"text-[9px] font-bold tracking-tight\"\n    }, t.l));\n  }))));\n};\nvar root = ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root'));\nroot.render(/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(App, null));\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,</script></head>\n<body>\n    <div id=\"root\"><div class=\"fixed inset-0 bg-[#17202A] z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-8 overflow-hidden\"><div class=\"relative mb-10 w-48 h-48 animate-speaker\"><img src=\"https://github.com/walterzinho/VocesApp/blob/main/LogoVC.png?raw=true\" class=\"w-full h-full object-contain\" alt=\"Logo\"></div><div class=\"text-center space-y-2\"><p class=\"text-[#F4D03F] text-[10px] font-black tracking-[0.5em]\">Emisora Digital</p><h1 class=\"text-4xl font-black tracking-tighter italic leading-none\">Voces Campesinas</h1><p class=\"text-white/40 text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] italic leading-tight\">\"El Campo Nos Une\"</p></div><div class=\"mt-12 w-32 h-0.5 bg-white/5 rounded-full overflow-hidden\"><div class=\"h-full bg-[#F4D03F] w-1/3 animate-loading\"></div></div><div class=\"absolute bottom-10 text-center opacity-40 text-[11px] font-medium tracking-tight space-y-1.5 px-4\"><p>Un Proyecto Desarrollado</p><p>Con EI - Inteligencia Emocional </p><p class=\"font-black text-[#F4D03F] text-2xl\"><span>Poporo Design</span></p></div></div></div>\n\n    <script type=\"text/babel\">\n        const { useState, useEffect, useRef } = React;\n        \n        // COMPONENTE: ICON (SVGS INTERNOS PARA MÁXIMA ESTABILIDAD)\n        const Icon = ({ name, size = 20, className = \"\" }) => {\n            const icons = {\n                'radio': <path d=\"M4.9 19.1a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l1.6-1.6a1 1 0 0 0 0-1.4 7 7 0 1 1 8.2 0 1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0 11 11 0 1 0-14.2 0ZM12 15a3 3 0 1 0 0-6 3 3 0 0 0 0 6Z\"/>,\n                'calendar': <g><rect x=\"3\" y=\"4\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\"></rect><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"2\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"6\"></line><line x1=\"8\" y1=\"2\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"6\"></line><line x1=\"3\" y1=\"10\" x2=\"21\" y2=\"10\"></line></g>,\n                'newspaper': <path d=\"M4 22h16a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V4a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H8a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 1-2 2Zm0 0a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-9c0-1.1.9-2 2-2h2\"/>,\n                'share-2': <g><circle cx=\"18\" cy=\"5\" r=\"3\"></circle><circle cx=\"6\" cy=\"12\" r=\"3\"></circle><circle cx=\"18\" cy=\"19\" r=\"3\"></circle><line x1=\"8.59\" y1=\"13.51\" x2=\"15.42\" y2=\"17.49\"></line><line x1=\"15.41\" y1=\"6.51\" x2=\"8.59\" y2=\"10.49\"></line></g>,\n                'play': <polygon points=\"5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3\"></polygon>,\n                'pause': <g><rect x=\"6\" y=\"4\" width=\"4\" height=\"16\"></rect><rect x=\"14\" y=\"4\" width=\"4\" height=\"16\"></rect></g>,\n                'square': <rect x=\"3\" y=\"3\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\"></rect>,\n                'volume-2': <g><polygon points=\"11 5 6 9 2 9 2 15 6 15 11 19 11 5\"></polygon><path d=\"M19.07 4.93a10 10 0 0 1 0 14.14\"></path><path d=\"M15.54 8.46a5 5 0 0 1 0 7.07\"></path></g>,\n                'volume-x': <g><polygon points=\"11 5 6 9 2 9 2 15 6 15 11 19 11 5\"></polygon><line x1=\"23\" y1=\"9\" x2=\"17\" y2=\"15\"></line><line x1=\"17\" y1=\"9\" x2=\"23\" y2=\"15\"></line></g>,\n                'download-cloud': <g><path d=\"M4 14.89c0-4 3.12-7.39 7.06-7.39 1.1 0 2.12.25 3.03.7a6 6 0 0 1 8.91 5.3c0 .54-.08 1.05-.22 1.54\"></path><path d=\"M12 12v9\"></path><path d=\"m15 18-3 3-3-3\"></path></g>,\n                'facebook': <path d=\"M18 2h-3a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v3H7v4h3v8h4v-8h3l1-4h-4V7a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h3z\"></path>,\n                'instagram': <g><rect x=\"2\" y=\"2\" width=\"20\" height=\"20\" rx=\"5\" ry=\"5\"></rect><path d=\"M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z\"></path><line x1=\"17.5\" y1=\"6.5\" x2=\"17.51\" y2=\"6.5\"></line></g>,\n                'youtube': <g><path d=\"M22.54 6.42a2.78 2.78 0 0 0-1.94-2C18.88 4 12 4 12 4s-6.88 0-8.6.46a2.78 2.78 0 0 0-1.94 2A29 29 0 0 0 1 11.75a29 29 0 0 0 .46 5.33A2.78 2.78 0 0 0 3.4 19c1.72.46 8.6.46 8.6.46s6.88 0 8.6-.46a2.78 2.78 0 0 0 1.94-2 29 29 0 0 0 .46-5.33 29 29 0 0 0-.46-5.33z\"></path><polygon points=\"9.75 15.02 15.5 11.75 9.75 8.48 9.75 15.02\"></polygon></g>,\n                'tiktok': <path d=\"M9 12a4 4 0 1 0 4 4V4a5 5 0 0 0 5 5\"></path>,\n                'globe': <g><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"></circle><line x1=\"2\" y1=\"12\" x2=\"22\" y2=\"12\"></line><path d=\"M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z\"></path></g>,\n                'chevron-right': <polyline points=\"9 18 15 12 9 6\"></polyline>,\n                'message-circle': <path d=\"m3 21 1.9-5.7a8.5 8.5 0 1 1 3.8 3.8z\"></path>,\n                'mail': <g><path d=\"m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7\"></path><rect x=\"2\" y=\"5\" width=\"20\" height=\"14\" rx=\"2\"></rect></g>,\n                'message-square': <path d=\"M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z\"></path>,\n                'clock': <g><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"></circle><polyline points=\"12 6 12 12 16 14\"></polyline></g>\n            };\n\n            return (\n                <svg \n                    viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" \n                    width={size} \n                    height={size} \n                    fill=\"none\" \n                    stroke=\"currentColor\" \n                    strokeWidth=\"2\" \n                    strokeLinecap=\"round\" \n                    strokeLinejoin=\"round\" \n                    className={className}\n                >\n                    {icons[name] || <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\" strokeDasharray=\"4\" />}\n                </svg>\n            );\n        };\n\n        const RADIO_CONFIG = {\n            name: \"Voces Campesinas\",\n            streamUrl: \"https://emisora.vocescampesinas.co/listen/vocescampesinas/radio.mp3\",\n            logoPath: \"https://github.com/walterzinho/VocesApp/blob/main/LogoVC.png?raw=true\", // LÍNEA 158\n            whatsapp: \"573224626138\",\n            displayWhatsapp: \"322.462.6138\",\n            youtubeUrl: \"https://www.youtube.com/@VocesCampesinasCo\",\n            webUrl: \"https://www.vocescampesinas.co\",\n            email: \"emisora@vocescampesinas.co\",\n            bloggerFeed: \"https://vocescampesinas.blogspot.com/feeds/posts/default?alt=json&max-results=12\"\n        };\n\n        const SCHEDULE = [\n            { start: \"00:00\", end: \"04:59\", title: \"La Licuadora\", host: \"Franja Crossover\", org: \"Voces Campesinas\", category: \"franja\", days: [1,2,3,4,5,6,0], image: \"la-licuadora.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"05:00\", end: \"06:29\", title: \"Alborada Campesina\", host: \"Música Colombiana\", org: \"Producción Local\", category: \"franja\", days: [1,2,3,4,5,6,0], image: \"alborada.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"06:15\", end: \"06:27\", title: \"Voces del Cosmos\", host: \"Horoscopo Semanal\", org: \"Voces Campesinas\", category: \"propio\", days: [6, 1], image: \"campesinos-accion.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"06:30\", end: \"06:59\", title: \"Campesinos en Acción\", host: \"José Antonio González\", org: \"ANUC La Palma\", category: \"entidad\", days: [6, 2], image: \"campesinos-accion.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"09:00\", end: \"09:59\", title: \"Perreo Campesino\", host: \"Música Carranguera\", org: \"Voces Campesinas\", category: \"franja\", days: [1,2,4,5,0], image: \"perreo-campesino.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"07:30\", end: \"10:59\", title: \"Magazín Región Activa\", host: \"Jotta Ricón\", org: \"CorpoActúa\", category: \"entidad\", days: [6, 3], image: \"region-activa.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"13:00\", end: \"13:59\", title: \"Perreo Campesino\", host: \"Música Carranguera\", org: \"Voces Campesinas\", category: \"franja\", days: [1,2,3,4,5,6,0], image: \"perreo-tarde.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"19:30\", end: \"20:30\", title: \"Renacer Andino\", host: \"Ramón Olivares\", org: \"Grupo Cultural de Antofagasta, Chile\", category: \"entidad\", days: [0, 3], image: \"renacer-andino.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"19:30\", end: \"22:59\", title: \"Lo Mejor de Región Activa\", host: \"Lo mejor del 2025 y 2026\", org: \"CorpoActúa\", category: \"reemision\", days: [5], image: \"resumen-region.jpg\" },\n            { start: \"--:--\", end: \"--:--\", title: \"La Parcela Política\", host: \"Gran Lanzamiento\", org: \"Voces Campesinas\", category: \"pronto\", days: [] },\n            { start: \"--:--\", end: \"--:--\", title: \"Sembrando Esperanza\", host: \"Gran Lanzamiento\", org: \"Voces Campesinas\", category: \"pronto\", days: [] },\n            { start: \"--:--\", end: \"--:--\", title: \"Palabras del Territorio\", host: \"Gran Lanzamiento\", org: \"Voces Campesinas\", category: \"pronto\", days: [] }\n        ];\n\n        const DAYS_SHORT = [\"Dom\", \"Lun\", \"Mar\", \"Mié\", \"Jue\", \"Vie\", \"Sáb\"];\n        const DAYS_FULL = [\"Domingo\", \"Lunes\", \"Martes\", \"Miércoles\", \"Jueves\", \"Viernes\", \"Sábado\"];\n\n        const App = () => {\n            const [isSplash, setIsSplash] = useState(true);\n            const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);\n            const [volume, setVolume] = useState(0.8);\n            const [currentView, setCurrentView] = useState('home');\n            const [currentProgram, setCurrentProgram] = useState(null);\n            const [nextProgram, setNextProgram] = useState(null);\n            const [nextDayInfo, setNextDayInfo] = useState(\"\");\n            const [news, setNews] = useState([]);\n            const [loadingNews, setLoadingNews] = useState(false);\n            const [formType, setFormType] = useState('mensaje'); \n            const [requestData, setRequestData] = useState({ nombre: '', cancion: '', interprete: '', mensaje: '' });\n            const [showInstallBtn, setShowInstallBtn] = useState(false);\n            const [deferredPrompt, setDeferredPrompt] = useState(null);\n\n            const audioRef = useRef(null);\n\n            // --- FUNCIÓN DE REPRODUCCIÓN (ASÍNCRONA PARA MEDIA SESSION) ---\n            const togglePlay = async () => {\n                if (!audioRef.current) return;\n                if (!isPlaying) {\n                    if(!audioRef.current.src) audioRef.current.src = RADIO_CONFIG.streamUrl;\n                    try {\n                        await audioRef.current.play();\n                        setIsPlaying(true);\n                    } catch (err) {\n                        console.warn(\"Reproducción interrumpida por el navegador.\");\n                    }\n                } else {\n                    audioRef.current.pause();\n                    setIsPlaying(false);\n                }\n            };\n\n            // ========================================================\n            // INTEGRACIÓN: MEDIA SESSION (CONTROLES PANTALLA BLOQUEO)\n            // ========================================================\n            useEffect(() => {\n                if ('mediaSession' in navigator) {\n                    try {\n                        // Construimos la URL absoluta de forma segura\n                        let absoluteLogoUrl = \"\";\n                        try {\n                            const baseUrl = window.location.origin + window.location.pathname;\n                            absoluteLogoUrl = new URL(RADIO_CONFIG.logoPath, baseUrl).href;\n                        } catch(e) {\n                            absoluteLogoUrl = RADIO_CONFIG.logoPath;\n                        }\n                        \n                        navigator.mediaSession.metadata = new MediaMetadata({\n                            title: currentProgram?.title || \"Música de la Tierrita\",\n                            artist: \"Voces Campesinas Radio\",\n                            album: \"El Campo Nos Une\",\n                            artwork: [\n                                { src: absoluteLogoUrl, sizes: '512x512', type: 'image/png' }\n                            ]\n                        });\n\n                        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('play', togglePlay);\n                        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('pause', togglePlay);\n                        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('stop', () => {\n                            if(audioRef.current) { audioRef.current.pause(); audioRef.current.src = \"\"; }\n                            setIsPlaying(false);\n                        });\n                    } catch (err) {\n                        console.warn(\"Error configurando Media Session:\", err);\n                    }\n                }\n            }, [currentProgram, isPlaying]);\n\n            useEffect(() => {\n                const splashTimer = setTimeout(() => setIsSplash(false), 4500);\n\n                if ('serviceWorker' in navigator && (window.location.protocol === 'https:' || window.location.hostname === 'localhost')) {\n                    navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js').then(reg => {\n                        reg.onupdatefound = () => {\n                            const installingWorker = reg.installing;\n                            installingWorker.onstatechange = () => {\n                                if (installingWorker.state === 'installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller) {\n                                    window.location.reload();\n                                }\n                            };\n                        };\n                    }).catch(e => console.warn('SW:', e.message));\n                }\n\n                window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', (e) => {\n                    e.preventDefault();\n                    setDeferredPrompt(e);\n                    setShowInstallBtn(true);\n                });\n\n                const updateTimeLogic = () => {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const cur = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes();\n                    const day = now.getDay();\n                    const timeToMin = (t) => { const [h,m] = t.split(':').map(Number); return h*60+m; };\n                    \n                    const prog = SCHEDULE.find(p => p.category !== 'pronto' && cur >= timeToMin(p.start) && cur < timeToMin(p.end) && (p.days ? p.days.includes(day) : true));\n                    setCurrentProgram(prog || null);\n\n                    let upcoming = null;\n                    let label = \"Hoy\";\n                    upcoming = SCHEDULE.filter(p => p.category !== 'pronto' && p.days.includes(day)).filter(p => timeToMin(p.start) > cur).sort((a,b) => timeToMin(a.start) - timeToMin(b.start))[0];\n\n                    if (!upcoming) {\n                        for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {\n                            const checkDay = (day + i) % 7;\n                            const found = SCHEDULE.filter(p => p.category !== 'pronto' && p.days.includes(checkDay)).sort((a,b) => timeToMin(a.start) - timeToMin(b.start))[0];\n                            if (found) {\n                                upcoming = found;\n                                label = i === 1 ? \"Mañana\" : DAYS_FULL[checkDay];\n                                break;\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                    setNextProgram(upcoming || null);\n                    setNextDayInfo(label);\n                };\n\n                updateTimeLogic();\n                const interval = setInterval(updateTimeLogic, 30000);\n                return () => { clearInterval(interval); clearTimeout(splashTimer); };\n            }, []);\n\n            const fetchNews = async () => {\n                setLoadingNews(true);\n                const target = RADIO_CONFIG.bloggerFeed;\n                const proxies = [\n                    `https://api.allorigins.win/get?url=${encodeURIComponent(target + '&t=' + Date.now())}`,\n                    `https://corsproxy.io/?${encodeURIComponent(target)}`\n                ];\n\n                const processData = (json) => {\n                    try {\n                        const entries = json.feed?.entry || [];\n                        const formatted = entries.map(e => {\n                            const link = e.link.find(l => l.rel === 'alternate')?.href || RADIO_CONFIG.webUrl;\n                            let img = \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500382017468-9049fed747ef?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=400\";\n                            if (e.media$thumbnail) img = e.media$thumbnail.url.replace('/s72-c/', '/s640/');\n                            return {\n                                title: e.title.$t,\n                                link: link,\n                                date: new Date(e.published.$t).toLocaleDateString('es-ES', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' }),\n                                thumbnail: img,\n                                summary: e.summary?.$t ? e.summary.$t.replace(/<[^>]*>?/gm, '').substring(0, 110).trim() + '...' : 'Toca para leer más.'\n                            };\n                        });\n                        setNews(formatted);\n                        setLoadingNews(false);\n                    } catch (err) { setLoadingNews(false); }\n                };\n\n                for (const url of proxies) {\n                    try {\n                        const res = await fetch(url);\n                        const raw = await res.json();\n                        const data = (typeof raw.contents === 'string') ? JSON.parse(raw.contents) : raw;\n                        if (data && data.feed) {\n                            processData(data);\n                            return;\n                        }\n                    } catch (e) { }\n                }\n                setLoadingNews(false);\n            };\n\n            useEffect(() => {\n                if (currentView === 'news' && news.length === 0) fetchNews();\n            }, [currentView]);\n\n            const handleInstall = async () => {\n                if (!deferredPrompt) return;\n                deferredPrompt.prompt();\n                const { outcome } = await deferredPrompt.userChoice;\n                if (outcome === 'accepted') setShowInstallBtn(false);\n                setDeferredPrompt(null);\n            };\n\n            const sendWp = (e) => {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                let msg = `📻 ¡Hola Voces Campesinas!\\n\\n*${formType === 'cancion' ? 'PEDIDO MUSICAL' : 'MENSAJE'}*\\nNombre: ${requestData.nombre}\\n${formType === 'cancion' ? 'Canción: '+requestData.cancion+'\\nArtista: '+requestData.interprete+'\\n' : ''}Mensaje: ${requestData.mensaje}`;\n                window.open(`https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${RADIO_CONFIG.whatsapp}&text=${encodeURIComponent(msg)}`, '_blank');\n            };\n\n            if (isSplash) {\n                return (\n                    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 bg-[#17202A] z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-8 overflow-hidden\">\n                        <div className=\"relative mb-10 w-48 h-48 animate-speaker\">\n                            <img src={RADIO_CONFIG.logoPath} className=\"w-full h-full object-contain\" alt=\"Logo\" />\n                        </div>\n                        <div className=\"text-center space-y-2\">\n                            <p className=\"text-[#F4D03F] text-[10px] font-black tracking-[0.5em]\">Emisora Digital</p>\n                            <h1 className=\"text-4xl font-black tracking-tighter italic leading-none\">Voces Campesinas</h1>\n                            <p className=\"text-white/40 text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] italic leading-tight\">\"El Campo Nos Une\"</p>\n                        </div>\n                        <div className=\"mt-12 w-32 h-0.5 bg-white/5 rounded-full overflow-hidden\">\n                            <div className=\"h-full bg-[#F4D03F] w-1/3 animate-loading\"></div>\n                        </div>\n                        <div className=\"absolute bottom-10 text-center opacity-40 text-[11px] font-medium tracking-tight space-y-1.5 px-4\">\n                            <p>Un Proyecto Desarrollado</p>\n                            <p>Con EI - Inteligencia Emocional </p>\n                            <p className=\"font-black text-[#F4D03F] text-2xl\"><span>Poporo Design</span></p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                );\n            }\n\n            return (\n                <div className=\"h-screen h-[100dvh] bg-[#17202A] text-white flex flex-col max-w-lg mx-auto shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n                    <audio ref={audioRef} preload=\"auto\" />\n                    \n                    {showInstallBtn && (\n                        <button onClick={handleInstall} className=\"fixed bottom-20 right-4 z-[60] bg-[#17202A] text-[#F4D03F] px-4 py-3 rounded-full shadow-2xl flex items-center gap-2 font-black text-xs animate-install\">\n                            <Icon name=\"download-cloud\" size={18} /> Instalar Voces-App\n                        </button>\n                    )}\n\n                    <div className=\"fixed top-0 w-full max-w-lg z-50 pointer-events-none\">\n                        <div className=\"pointer-events-auto bg-[#0a0e13]/95 backdrop-blur-3xl border-b border-[#F4D03F]/30 p-3 shadow-2xl\">\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between gap-4 px-1\">\n                                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                                    <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${isPlaying ? 'bg-[#6cd14f] animate-pulse' : 'bg-white/10'}`}></div>\n                                    <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                                        <p className=\"text-[13px] font-bold text-white/95 truncate leading-tight\">Estás Escuchando la Emisora Digital</p>\n                                        <p className=\"text-[11px] font-black text-[#F4D03F] tracking-tighter opacity-90 leading-none mt-0.5\">www.VocesCampesinas.co</p>\n                                    </div>\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                                    <button onClick={() => {audioRef.current.pause(); audioRef.current.src=\"\"; setIsPlaying(false);}} className=\"w-10 h-10 bg-white/5 text-white/30 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-colors\"><Icon name=\"square\" size={16} className=\"text-[#C0392B]\" /></button>\n                                    <button onClick={togglePlay} className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-[#F4D03F] text-black rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl active:scale-90 transition-all\">\n                                        {isPlaying ? <Icon name=\"pause\" size={24} /> : <Icon name=\"play\" size={24} className=\"ml-0.5\" />}\n                                    </button>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mt-3 px-1\">\n                                <Icon name={volume == 0 ? \"volume-x\" : \"volume-2\"} size={14} className=\"text-[#F4D03F]/30\" />\n                                <input type=\"range\" min=\"0\" max=\"1\" step=\"0.01\" value={volume} onChange={e => {setVolume(e.target.value); audioRef.current.volume = e.target.value;}} className=\"flex-1 h-1 bg-white/10 rounded-full appearance-none volume-slider cursor-pointer\" />\n                                <span className=\"text-[9px] font-bold text-white/20 w-7 text-right\">{Math.round(volume*100)}%</span>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <main className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto hide-scrollbar pt-[103px] pb-24 px-0\">\n                        {currentView === 'home' && (\n                            <div key=\"home-view\" className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-700 px-0\">\n                                <div className=\"live-card\" style={{ backgroundImage: `url(${currentProgram?.image || 'general-musica.jpg'})` }}>\n                                    <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-10 p-4 flex flex-col justify-end\">\n                                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-1\">\n                                            <span className=\"bg-red-600 text-white text-[8px] font-black px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full animate-pulse uppercase tracking-widest\">En Vivo</span>\n                                            <span className=\"text-white/60 text-[10px] font-bold tracking-tighter\">Transmitiendo:</span>\n                                        </div>\n                                        <h2 className=\"text-xl font-black text-white truncate drop-shadow-lg\">{currentProgram?.title || \"La Música de la Tierrita...\"}</h2>\n                                        <p className=\"text-[#F4D03F] text-[10px] font-bold italic opacity-90 truncate drop-shadow-md\">{currentProgram ? ` ${currentProgram.org}` : \"Lo Mejor de Nuestro Campo...\"}</p>\n                                    </div>\n                                </div>\n\n                                <div className=\"next-band py-2.5 px-6 flex items-center gap-4 transition-all\">\n                                    <div className=\"p-2 bg-[#F4D03F]/10 rounded-xl shrink-0\"><Icon name=\"chevron-right\" className=\"text-[#F4D03F]\" size={16} /></div>\n                                    <div className=\"overflow-hidden flex-1\">\n                                        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center gap-2 mb-0.5\">\n                                            <p className=\"text-[7px] font-black text-[#F4D03F]/70 tracking-[0.2em] uppercase\">A Continuación:</p>\n                                            <span className=\"text-[6px] font-black bg-[#F4D03F] text-[#17202A] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded whitespace-nowrap\">{nextDayInfo}</span>\n                                        </div>\n                                        <h3 className=\"font-black text-white text-sm truncate\">{nextProgram ? nextProgram.title : \"Música de la Tierrita\"}</h3>\n                                        <p className=\"text-[9px] text-white/40 italic truncate\"><span className=\"text-[#F4D03F]/80 font-bold\">{nextProgram?.start}</span> {nextProgram?.host ? ` ${nextProgram.host}` : \"Franja Musical\"}</p>\n                                    </div>\n                                </div>\n\n                                <div className=\"px-6 py-6\">\n                                    <div className=\"text-center mb-5\">\n                                        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-black text-[#F4D03F] tracking-tighter\">Interactúa con Nosotros</h2>\n                                        <p className=\"text-[8px] font-bold text-white/30 tracking-[0.2em] italic uppercase\">Mensajes y Complacencias</p>\n                                    </div>\n                                    <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-4 bg-black/40 p-1 rounded-xl border border-white/5\">\n                                        <button onClick={() => setFormType('mensaje')} className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-bold transition-all ${formType === 'mensaje' ? 'bg-[#F4D03F] text-black shadow-lg' : 'text-white/40'}`}>Mensaje</button>\n                                        <button onClick={() => setFormType('cancion')} className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-bold transition-all ${formType === 'cancion' ? 'bg-[#F4D03F] text-black shadow-lg' : 'text-white/40'}`}>Canción</button>\n                                    </div>\n                                    <form onSubmit={sendWp} className=\"space-y-2.5\">\n                                        <input required placeholder=\"¿Cómo te llamas?\" className=\"w-full glass-card p-3.5 rounded-xl text-xs outline-none focus:border-[#F4D03F]/50 text-white\" onChange={e => setRequestData({...requestData, nombre: e.target.value})} />\n                                        {formType === 'cancion' && (\n                                            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2.5\">\n                                                <input required placeholder=\"Canción\" className=\"w-full glass-card p-3.5 rounded-xl text-xs outline-none focus:border-[#F4D03F]/50 text-white\" onChange={e => setRequestData({...requestData, cancion: e.target.value})} />\n                                                <input required placeholder=\"Artista\" className=\"w-full glass-card p-3.5 rounded-xl text-xs outline-none focus:border-[#F4D03F]/50 text-white\" onChange={e => setRequestData({...requestData, interprete: e.target.value})} />\n                                            </div>\n                                        )}\n                                        <textarea required placeholder=\"Escribe aquí...\" rows=\"3\" className=\"w-full glass-card p-3.5 rounded-xl text-xs outline-none focus:border-[#F4D03F]/50 resize-none text-white\" onChange={e => setRequestData({...requestData, mensaje: e.target.value})}></textarea>\n                                        <button className=\"w-full bg-[#F4D03F] text-black py-3.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs shadow-xl hover:bg-white active:scale-95 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mb-4\">\n                                            <Icon name=\"message-circle\" size={16} /> Enviar Mensaje a WhatsApp\n                                        </button>\n                                        <div className=\"pt-4 mt-2 border-t border-white/5 flex flex-col items-center gap-2.5 text-[10px] text-white/40 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest\">\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                                                <Icon name=\"mail\" size={14} className=\"text-[#F4D03F]\" />\n                                                <span>E-Mail:</span>\n                                                <a href={`mailto:${RADIO_CONFIG.email}`} className=\"text-white/80 lowercase font-normal\">{RADIO_CONFIG.email}</a>\n                                            </div>\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                                                <Icon name=\"message-square\" size={14} className=\"text-[#F4D03F]\" />\n                                                <span>WhatsApp:</span>\n                                                <a href={`https://wa.me/${RADIO_CONFIG.whatsapp}`} className=\"text-white/80\">{RADIO_CONFIG.displayWhatsapp}</a>\n                                            </div>\n                                        </div>\n                                    </form>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n\n                        {currentView === 'schedule' && (\n                            <div key=\"schedule-view\" className=\"px-6 pb-20 animate-in fade-in duration-500 overflow-y-auto\">\n                                <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-center mb-6 pt-4 text-[#F4D03F]\">¡Programate con Voces Campesinas!</h2>\n                                {['propio', 'franja', 'entidad', 'reemision', 'pronto'].map(cat => {\n                                    const progs = SCHEDULE.filter(p => p.category === cat);\n                                    if(progs.length === 0) return null;\n                                    const todayIdx = new Date().getDay();\n                                    const labels = { propio: 'Nuestro Programas', franja: 'Franjas Musicales', entidad: 'RIT - Red de Información Territorial', reemision: 'Reemisiones', pronto: 'Próximamente' };\n                                    const isPronto = cat === 'pronto';\n                                    \n                                    return (\n                                        <div key={cat} className={`mb-8 ${isPronto ? 'opacity-60' : ''}`}>\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-3 opacity-50\">\n                                                <Icon name={isPronto ? \"clock\" : \"calendar\"} size={14}/>\n                                                <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest\">{labels[cat]}</span>\n                                            </div>\n                                            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                                                {progs.map((p, i) => (\n                                                    <div key={`prog-${cat}-${i}`} className={`glass-card p-4 ${isPronto ? 'border-dashed border-white/20 grayscale pointer-events-none' : ''}`}>\n                                                        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-1\">\n                                                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n                                                                <span className=\"text-[#F4D03F] text-[11px] font-bold\">{p.start} - {p.end}</span>\n                                                                <div className=\"flex gap-1\">\n                                                                    {isPronto ? (\n                                                                        <span className=\"text-[7px] bg-white/10 text-white/50 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-black tracking-widest uppercase\">Proximamennte</span>\n                                                                    ) : (\n                                                                        [0,1,2,3,4,5,6].map(dIdx => {\n                                                                            if (!p.days.includes(dIdx)) return null;\n                                                                            const isToday = dIdx === todayIdx;\n                                                                            return (\n                                                                                <span key={`day-${dIdx}`} className={`text-[7px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-black transition-all ${isToday ? 'bg-[#F4D03F] text-[#17202A] scale-110 shadow-lg' : 'bg-white/5 text-white/20'}`}>\n                                                                                    {DAYS_SHORT[dIdx]}\n                                                                                </span>\n                                                                            );\n                                                                        })\n                                                                    )}\n                                                                </div>\n                                                            </div>\n                                                            {currentProgram?.title === p.title && currentProgram?.start === p.start && <div className=\"bg-[#F4D03F] text-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[8px] font-bold animate-pulse\">Al Aire</div>}\n                                                        </div>\n                                                        <div className=\"font-bold text-base mt-1\">{p.title}</div>\n                                                        <div className=\"text-white/40 text-[10px] italic\"><span>con {p.host}</span></div>\n                                                    </div>\n                                                ))}\n                                            </div>\n                                        </div>\n                                    );\n                                })}\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n\n                        {currentView === 'news' && (\n                            <div key=\"news-view\" className=\"px-4 pb-20 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n                                <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-center mb-6 pt-4 text-[#F4D03F]\">Conexión Territorial - Información y Noticias</h2>\n                                {loadingNews ? (\n                                    <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24\">\n                                        <div className=\"w-10 h-10 border-4 border-white/5 border-t-[#F4D03F] rounded-full animate-spin mb-6\"></div>\n                                        <p className=\"text-[10px] font-black text-white/30 uppercase tracking-[0.3em] animate-pulse\">Consultando el Blog...</p>\n                                    </div>\n                                ) : (\n                                    <div className=\"space-y-4 pb-10\">\n                                        {news.length > 0 ? news.map((item, idx) => (\n                                            <div key={`news-${idx}`} onClick={() => window.open(item.link, '_blank')} className=\"glass-card flex gap-4 p-3 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all cursor-pointer border-white/5\">\n                                                <div className=\"shrink-0 w-[90px] h-[90px] rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-black/40 border border-white/5\">\n                                                    <img src={item.thumbnail} alt=\"Img\" className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\" onError={(e) => e.target.src=\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500382017468-9049fed747ef?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300\"} />\n                                                </div>\n                                                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col justify-between py-0.5\">\n                                                    <div>\n                                                        <span className=\"text-[8px] font-black bg-[#F4D03F] text-[#17202A] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded mb-1.5 inline-block\">{item.date}</span>\n                                                        <h3 className=\"font-bold text-[13px] leading-tight mb-1 line-clamp-2\">{item.title}</h3>\n                                                    </div>\n                                                    <p className=\"text-[10px] text-white/40 italic line-clamp-2\">{item.summary}</p>\n                                                </div>\n                                            </div>\n                                        )) : (\n                                            <div className=\"text-center py-20 px-6\">\n                                                <Icon name=\"newspaper\" size={40} className=\"mx-auto text-white/10 mb-4\" />\n                                                <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-white/40 mb-6 uppercase tracking-widest font-black\">No se pudo conectar con el Blog</p>\n                                                <button onClick={fetchNews} className=\"bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl text-xs font-black uppercase hover:bg-white/10 transition-all\">Reintentar Carga</button>\n                                            </div>\n                                        )}\n                                    </div>\n                                )}\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n\n                        {currentView === 'social' && (\n                            <div key=\"social-view\" className=\"px-6 animate-in fade-in text-center max-w-md mx-auto\">\n                                <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-1 pt-4 text-[#F4D03F]\">Siguenos y Dale Me Gusta</h2>\n                                <p className=\"text-white/40 text-[16px] font-bold tracking-widest mb-10 italic\">#ElCampoNosUne</p>\n                                <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 pb-20\">\n                                    {[\n                                        { n: 'YouTube', i: 'youtube', u: RADIO_CONFIG.youtubeUrl },\n                                        { n: 'Facebook', i: 'facebook', u: \"https://www.facebook.com/VocesCampesinas.co\" },\n                                        { n: 'Instagram', i: 'instagram', u: \"https://www.instagram.com/vocescampesinas.co/\" },\n                                        { n: 'TikTok', i: 'tiktok', u: \"https://www.tiktok.com/@vocescampesinas.co\" },\n                                        { n: 'Sitio Web', i: 'globe', u: RADIO_CONFIG.webUrl },\n                                        { n: 'E-mail', i: 'mail', u: `mailto:${RADIO_CONFIG.email}` }\n                                    ].map(s => (\n                                        <button key={s.n} onClick={() => window.open(s.u, '_blank')} className=\"glass-card flex items-center justify-between p-5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all border-white/5\">\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n                                                <Icon name={s.i} size={22} className=\"text-[#F4D03F]\" />\n                                                <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{s.n}</span>\n                                            </div>\n                                            <Icon name=\"chevron-right\" size={14} className=\"opacity-20\" />\n                                        </button>\n                                    ))}\n                                    <div className=\"pt-4 mt-2 border-t border-white/5 flex flex-col items-center gap-2.5 text-[10px] text-white/40 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest\">\n                                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                                            <Icon name=\"mail\" size={14} className=\"text-[#F4D03F]\" />\n                                            <span>E-Mail:</span>\n                                            <a href={`mailto:${RADIO_CONFIG.email}`} className=\"text-white/80 lowercase font-normal\">{RADIO_CONFIG.email}</a>\n                                        </div>\n                                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                                            <Icon name=\"message-square\" size={14} className=\"text-[#F4D03F]\" />\n                                            <span>WhatsApp:</span>\n                                            <a href={`https://wa.me/${RADIO_CONFIG.whatsapp}`} className=\"text-white/80\">{RADIO_CONFIG.displayWhatsapp}</a>\n                                        </div>\n                                    </div>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n                    </main>\n\n                    <div className=\"fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-lg z-50 pointer-events-none\">\n                        <nav className=\"pointer-events-auto bg-[#0a0e13]/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 flex justify-around items-center h-14 shadow-2xl\">\n                            {[ \n                                { id: 'home', l: 'Radio', i: 'radio' }, \n                                { id: 'schedule', l: 'Horarios', i: 'calendar' => (\n                                <button key={t.id} onClick={() => setCurrentView(t.id)} className={`flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 transition-all px-6 h-full justify-center ${currentView === t.id ? 'active-tab' : 'text-white/30'}`}>\n                                    <Icon name={t.i} size={20} />\n                                    <span className=\"text-[9px] font-bold tracking-tight\">{t.l}</span>\n                                </button>\n                            ))}\n                        </nav>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            );\n        };\n\n        const root = ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root'));\n        root.render(<App />);\n    </script>\n\n\n</body></html>",
